zh.lifeSummary: 當Aline Rie於1185年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可辛加姆時，她的父親Hubert III de Rie - Baron of Higham38歲，母親Margaret Fitz Roscelin35歲。她於1200年與John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham在英國諾福爾可辛加姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1267年9月在英國諾福爾可霍可林享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aline Rie于1185年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可辛加姆时，她的父亲Hubert III de Rie - Baron of Higham38岁，母亲Margaret Fitz Roscelin35岁。她于1200年与John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham在英国諾福爾可辛加姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1267年9月在英国諾福爾可霍可林享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived beside a road, track, or pathway, Old French rue (from Latin ruga ‘crease, fold’).
Shortened form of American French   Larue   2, itself an altered form of French   Leroux  .

English: from Middle English rew (Old English rāw) ‘row’. The surname may be topographic, signifying someone who lived by a hedgerow or in a row of houses in a street, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Rewe (Devon), Rew Farm in Rockbeare (Devon), and Rew in Malborough (Devon). See also Rawe 1 and Rowe .

variants.name: Larue
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived beside a road, track, or pathway, Old French rue (see Rue ), with fused feminine definite article la; or a habitational name from La Rue, the name of several places in various parts of France, of the same origin. Compare Delarue .
Altered form of French   Leroux  . Compare   Rue   2.

History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (in the form La Rue, along with the variant Larew and the original form Le Roux) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Ruen
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm so named, among others in Hadeland, from Old Norse ruth ‘clearing’. Compare Rue .
German: variant of Ruhn, from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name such as Ruomald. The surname Ruen is virtually non-existing in Germany.
Possibly also an altered form of German Rühen, a shortened form of Rüden (see Ruden ). The surname Rühen is very rare in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Aline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: In the Middle Ages this represented a contracted form of Adeline . In modern use it is either a revival of this or a respelling of Aileen . In Scotland and Ireland it has sometimes been chosen as representing an Anglicized spelling of the Gaelic vocabulary word àlainn (Scottish), álainn (Irish), meaning ‘lovely’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Aline Rie was born in 1185, in Hingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hubert III de Rie - Baron of Higham, was 38 and her mother, Margaret Fitz Roscelin, was 35. She married John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham in 1200, in Hingham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in September 1267, in Hockering, Norfolk, England, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aline Rie est née en 1185, à Hingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hubert III de Rie - Baron of Higham, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margaret Fitz Roscelin, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham en 1200, à Hingham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en septembre 1267, à Hockering, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aline Rie 1185 in Hingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hubert III de Rie - Baron of Higham 38 und ihre Mutter Margaret Fitz Roscelin 35. Sie hat 1200 in Hingham, Norfolk, England John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im September 1267 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Hockering, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aline Rie è nata il nel 1185 nel Hingham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hubert III de Rie - Baron of Higham, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Margaret Fitz Roscelin, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham nel 1200, nel Hingham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel settembre 1267, nel Hockering, Norfolk, England, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aline Rieが1185年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクヒンガムで生まれた時，父Hubert III de Rie - Baron of Highamは38歳，母Margaret Fitz Roscelinは35歳であった。1200年にイギリスノーフォルクヒンガムでJohn Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hinghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1267年9月にイギリスノーフォルクホーッカーイングで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aline Rie(이)가 1185년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hubert III de Rie - Baron of Higham(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Fitz Roscelin(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1200년 영국 노르폴크 잉함에서 John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1267년 9월 영국 노르폴크 호커잉에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aline Rie nasceu em 1185, em Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hubert III de Rie - Baron of Higham, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Fitz Roscelin, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham em 1200, em Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em setembro de 1267, em Hockering, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aline Rie родилась в 1185 г. в местности хингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hubert III de Rie - Baron of Higham было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Fitz Roscelin, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham в 1200 г. в местности хингхам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла сентябрь 1267 г. в местности хоккиринг, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aline Rie nació en 1185, en Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hubert III de Rie - Baron of Higham, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Margaret Fitz Roscelin, tenía 35 años. Se casó con John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham en 1200, en Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en septiembre de 1267, en Hockering, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 82 años.
